description: Ablation comparing baseline agent vs agent with confidence-aware abstention mechanism

statistical_test.result: REJECT null hypothesis — Delta A is positive with p=0.0005

program_baseline_reference.note: Delta C informational only. Model difference makes direct comparison invalid.

honest_limitations: Model difference between baseline and mechanism run — part of Delta A may reflect model improvement
Sample size 20-22 evaluated tasks — larger sample would tighten confidence intervals
Infra error rate consistent at ~33% — model-harness format incompatibility unrelated to mechanism

automated_optimization_baseline.note: Program-provided baseline. Delta B not directly measured — GEPA/AutoAgent not available in challenge environment. Program baseline serves as automated optimization reference.

held_out_slice_note: The sealed held-out partition (20 tasks) was not delivered by the program. Delta A is measured on the 30-task dev slice. This is documented honestly. The program announcement removed the 5-trial requirement but did not confirm delivery of the sealed partition. All three conditions run on dev slice only.
